about.title: Court Bailiff Marcin Starzec
about.story.title: Bailiff's Office No. IX in Otwock
about.story.content:
With over 15 years of experience as a court bailiff, I specialize in effective and timely enforcement of court orders. My goal is to provide creditors with professional service at every stage of the enforcement process.

A graduate of the Faculty of Law at the University of Warsaw and a long-standing practitioner in enforcement law. Bailiff's Office No. IX in Otwock uses modern IT systems — CEPIK, EPU, PUE ZUS, ePUAP, and OGNIVO — ensuring efficient and electronic case handling.

Trust experience and integrity — I am your dedicated bailiff and trusted partner in debt recovery.
about.career.title: My Career
about.career.items.0.title: Court Bailiff at the District Court in Otwock
about.career.items.0.company: Bailiff's Office No. IX in Otwock
about.career.items.0.description: As the founder and head of Bailiff's Office No. IX, I provide professional enforcement services for individual creditors and businesses. I specialize in monetary enforcement, evictions, and judicial correspondence delivery, offering comprehensive case handling.
about.career.items.1.title: Bailiff's Assessor
about.career.items.1.description: At the Warsaw office I gained extensive experience in conducting enforcement proceedings, locating debtor assets, and operating electronic data exchange systems with banks and public institutions. The practical knowledge acquired became the foundation for independent practice.
about.career.items.2.title: Bailiff's Trainee
about.career.items.2.company: Chamber of Court Bailiffs in Warsaw
about.career.items.2.description: I completed my bailiff traineeship under the supervision of experienced court bailiffs, gaining practical knowledge of enforcement law, court procedures, and office management. The traineeship concluded with a very good result on the bailiff examination.

home.services.title: I specialize in
home.about.title: Effective and Reliable Court Enforcement
home.about.subtitle: Bailiff's Office No. IX in Otwock, led by Court Bailiff Marcin Starzec, provides professional handling of enforcement cases. We guarantee electronic correspondence, timely processing of enforcement applications, and reporting to creditors on all actions taken.
features.title: Modern Office Tools
features.subtitle: We use the latest IT systems to ensure efficient and effective case handling.
features.items.0.description: An IT system encompassing a central database containing data and information on road motor vehicles, their owners and holders.
features.items.1.description: This system allows us to conduct enforcement proceedings based on an electronic enforcement title.
features.items.2.description: The Electronic Services Platform of ZUS, used to locate sources of debtor income and assets.
features.items.3.description: Electronic Platform for Public Administration Services.
features.items.4.description: A banking system enabling electronic exchange of information between the bailiff and banks.
features.items.5.title: KOMORNIK.IT Software
features.items.5.description: Including: SkanDok SQL, Raport Egzekucji, CEIDG, SISP, KRD, GEOPORTAL, DEKRETATOR. IT support by SPECKOM Tomasz Śmieja.
features.items.6.title: Komornik Online
features.items.6.description: Module enabling access to case files via a web browser.
testimonials.items.0.title: Professional and Efficient Service
testimonials.items.0.description: Bailiff Starzec and his team completed the entire process on time, keeping us informed at every stage of the proceedings. I recommend them to anyone looking for an effective and reliable bailiff's office.
testimonials.items.1.title: Reliability and Transparency
testimonials.items.1.description: Fast processing of enforcement applications and full transparency of actions. An office you can trust at every stage of cooperation.
testimonials.items.2.title: Modern Communication
testimonials.items.2.description: Efficient electronic communication and timely execution. The office uses modern systems, which significantly speeds up the entire enforcement process.
faq.items.0.question: How do I file an enforcement application?
faq.items.0.answer: An enforcement application can be submitted in person at the office, sent by traditional mail, or electronically via the EPU system. The application must include the enforcement title bearing an enforcement clause.
faq.items.1.question: How long does enforcement proceedings take?
faq.items.1.answer: The duration depends on many factors, including the type of enforcement, the debtor's assets, and their cooperation. Simple cases can be resolved within a few weeks; more complex ones may take longer.
faq.items.2.question: What are the costs of bailiff enforcement?
faq.items.2.answer: Enforcement costs are governed by the Act on Bailiff Costs. The enforcement fee is generally 10% of the recovered amount. Detailed cost information is provided on an individual basis.
faq.items.3.question: Can I track the progress of my case online?
faq.items.3.answer: Yes, the office uses the Komornik Online system, which allows access to case files via a web browser. Access is granted upon request.
faq.items.4.question: What is the jurisdiction of the office?
faq.items.4.answer: The office operates at the District Court in Otwock and covers that court's jurisdiction. At the creditor's choice, we may also handle cases throughout the country, except for eviction cases.
